critic_notes: ORP.2 Personal: 3 questions on ORP.2.A2/A5/A3. Quotes match after dehyphenation. Correct answers faithful (onboarding duties, confidentiality upon termination, Vertretungsregelung); distractors clearly wrong. Topic `bausteine`, difficulty `basis` throughout — appropriate. Schema clean.

issues.detail: Fragment `Bevor externe Personen Zugang und Zugriff zu vertraulichen Informationen erhalten, MÜSSEN ...` contains line-break hyphen artifact from PDF extraction; matches under dehyphenation within section range.

Fragment `Die Vorgesetzten MÜSSEN dafür sorgen, dass im laufenden Betrieb Vertretungsregelungen umge...` contains line-break hyphen artifact from PDF extraction; matches under dehyphenation within section range.
